name: Elemental Ballistic
short_description: block balls from entering your goal and shoot it toward other player's goals to knock them out, the last player standing wins
detailed_description:
"Elemental Ballistic" is a fast-paced, competitive action game where up to four players face off in an arena, aiming to knock each other out by scoring goals. Each player controls a unique elemental bumper, The last bumper standing claims victory!

But the fun doesn't stop with multiplayer mayhem. "Elemental Ballistic" also features a captivating single-player mode, perfect for honing your skills or enjoying the game solo. In this mode, players can take on challenging AI opponents or test their mettle in various stages, each with unique twists and mechanics. Whether you're looking for a quick match with friends or an engaging solo experience, "Elemental Ballistic" delivers endless fun and excitement.
